label: fast_pacing_conflict
description: Motorcycle racer on mountain roads at sunset — fast pacing, conflict structure (launch → mid-race push → mountain crest climax)

input.topic: a motorbike racer speeding through mountain roads at sunset

character.name: The Racer
character.wardrobe: full red-and-black racing suit and helmet

world.environment: rugged mountain cliffs, cracked tarmac, loose gravel

visual_constants.color_palette: amber, burnt orange, blood red, dark asphalt
visual_constants.lighting_rule: sunset orange floods the scene from ahead with long dramatic shadows
visual_constants.style_lock: cinematic style, wide-angle lens, fast dynamic motion

audio_constants.ambient_layer: wind rush and tyre roar blending into the open-air soundscape

story_bible.narrative_reason: The race pits the rider against the mountain itself — escalating from launch through straight-line speed to a dramatic crest moment.

output.topic: a motorbike racer speeding through mountain roads at sunset
output.full_story: The racer dumps the clutch and launches hard into the first hairpin bend, conquering the curve. Tucking low, they blast down a long straight directly into the burning sunset. The conflict climaxes as the racer drives over the mountain crest, launching the front wheel against the amber sky.

frames.prompt: Low angle cinematic wide-angle tracking shot of a motorbike racer in a full red-and-black racing suit and helmet launching hard on a narrow winding mountain road at sunset. The racer dumps the clutch and the 1000cc racing motorbike erupts forward, rear tyre spraying loose gravel as they accelerate into the first hairpin bend. The rider drops their body low, leaning hard into the curve, elbows flared. Cinematic style, wide-angle lens, fast dynamic motion. Sunset orange floods the scene from ahead with long dramatic shadows. The thundering roar of the engine tears through the mountain air and the wind rush and tyre roar fill the soundscape continuously to the end of the clip.

Continuing from the hairpin exit, the rider drops flat over the tank, tucking chin to tank-bag, and blasts down a long straight directly into the detonating golden lens flare of the sunset. The bike howls at redline as maximum speed is reached, the road rushing beneath in a blur. Cinematic style, wide-angle lens, fast dynamic motion. Sunset orange floods the scene from ahead with long dramatic shadows. The screaming engine note continues unbroken, sustained at peak revs and the wind rush and tyre roar fill the soundscape to the final second of this clip.

Extending from the straight, the racer drives hard up the final steep rise toward the mountain crest. As the bike hits the summit, the rider stands briefly on the footpegs and launches the front wheel into the air, silhouetted against the burning amber sky. Cinematic style, wide-angle lens, fast dynamic motion. Sunset orange floods the scene from ahead with long dramatic shadows. The aggressive engine note sustains loud and the wind rush and tyre roar blend into the open-air soundscape to the final second of the clip.
